workHistory.description: Built full-stack web applications using React and Node.js. Developed codemind-c, codemind-cpp, codemind-java, codemind-python course platforms.
Built multi-tenant SaaS platform, Event-Driven Order Processing System with Apache Kafka, Financial Ledger API with Double-Entry Bookkeeping, LLM Prompt Router, and an AI Portfolio site.

summary: Passionate Full Stack Developer with strong foundations in Data Structures and Algorithms. Experienced in building scalable event-driven systems and cross-platform applications.
